_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the expression-language-mismatch branch of the 'VisualBasicValue`1 requires compilation' runtime-exceptions playbook. The OrderRouter project is expressionLanguage CSharp / targetFramework Windows, but the Assign 'Build Route Key' value is a VisualBasicValue node (VB '&' concatenation) left over from a paste out of a VB project. Modern .NET runtime JIT is disabled, so the stray VB expression cannot compile at run. Decisive evidence: project.json expressionLanguage=CSharp combined with the <mva:VisualBasicValue> node in process/Main.xaml. Expected chain: folders list -> jobs get <key> -> jobs logs <key> --level Error -> read process/project.json + Main.xaml.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched above returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent enumerates folders to locate the Shared folder where the faulted job lives.
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the 'requires compilation' error and the stack frame pointing at the Assign 'Build Route Key'.
OPTIONAL — error-level logs corroborate the error; the job-get Info already carries it.
